ai_summary: Ganga Forging Limited has finalized the terms for a Rights Issue, aiming to raise approximately Rs. 32.96 Crores by offering 20.22 crore new equity shares at Rs. 1.63 each to existing shareholders on a 3:2 ratio. This initiative will result in a significant dilution of existing shareholders' stakes, nearly tripling the outstanding shares from 13.48 crore to 33.70 crore, with the specific strategic use of these substantial funds remaining undisclosed in this announcement.
